name: schedule-management
description: 班次排班管理桌面与 Web 一体化项目
author: Saxon Liu

scripts.build:desktop: npm run type-check && npm run type-check:electron && vite build --mode electron
scripts.build:portable: npm run clean:release && npm run holidays:update && npm run build:desktop && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win portable --publish never
scripts.build:setup: npm run clean:release && npm run holidays:update && npm run build:desktop && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --publish never
scripts.build:green: npm run clean:release && npm run holidays:update && npm run build:desktop && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win zip --publish never
scripts.build:all: npm run clean:release && npm run holidays:update && npm run build:desktop && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win portable nsis zip --publish never
scripts.pack:dir: npm run clean:release && npm run holidays:update && npm run build:desktop && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir --publish never
